div.style: padding: 40px; box-sizing: border-box; height: 100%; width: 100%; background-color: #f5f5f5;

button.style: padding: 15px 30px; font-size: 18px; font-weight: bold; cursor: pointer; background-color: #007bff; color: white; border: none; border-radius: 5px;

iframe.style: width: 100%; height: calc(100% - 100px); border: 2px solid #333; background-color: white; border-radius: 8px;
